meaning: n.海滨浴场,海滨游乐场(尤指远洋客轮上的),露天游泳池
examples: Foreigner: I live in the Holiday Inn Lido Hotel.
We who love the Lido gig's reflective pace hope not.
Be sure to see the exhibition at the Lido Gallery.
Eureka Park is at The Venetian, Level 3, Lido 3101, Murano 3201-3301, San Polo 3404.
Port Talbot's Afon Lido was unavailable and Carmarthen's outdoor Showground unsuitable for a March fight.
